column8: Found my new go-to spot in Bangalore! Selenophile Cafe is a cozy cafe and co-working space that has it all - amazing coffee, delicious continental food, and the most heavenly kunafa. The best part? Free wifi and the sandwiches are made with tasty focaccia bread. Need a place to work or have a meeting? They've got you covered with a small meeting room. Whether you're a coffee lover, foodie, or just need a cool workspace, this place has everything you need. Can't wait to spend more time here, sipping coffee and enjoying their scrumptious offerings.

column8: This is one of the best café in BTM with amazing food quality and ambience. What I liked about this place is the engagement  of food and table games. Food and service is great. Must try is their English breakfast for Veg and Nonveg both, Corn and Spinach Sandwich should be in their best seller. It’s is pocket friendly as compared to other cafés in BTM. Let’s promote these small cafés than big ones because they deserve it too. Service is a bit slow as they prepare food items freshly after order but believe me it all be worth the wait. We even tried Pink pasta,  cooler drinks, crispy chicken burger and hot dogs. We have visited there twice and def will go more often.

column8: I recently visited Selenophile Cafe in BTM Layout and loved it! Their English breakfast platter at is great deal, The avocado toast is a must-try, and their Matcha Latte, Cappuccino, and Chocolate Cold Coffee are delightful. column8: Had an amazing experience trying the kunafa here! The texture was perfectly crispy on the outside while being deliciously gooey and cheesy inside. The balance of sweetness with the syrup was just right, and the touch of crushed pistachios added a great flavor. Served hot and fresh, this dessert truly hit the spot. Highly recommend it for anyone looking for an authentic and satisfying kunafa experience!
